title: Drill Patterns and Dual Shot Volume
notes: Drill Log Hole Diameter and Drilled Depth Range callouts were moved fully below the header so they no longer overlap the Drill Log number or date.
Patterns and Shot Volume are now available in both the Drill Log and Shot Diagram.
Selected Drill Log holes, rows, columns, or pages can be assigned to named burden and spacing patterns through Edit Holes.
Both templates now report Shot Volume (Rock Only) and Shot Volume (Rock and Overburden).
Rock-only volume uses depth minus overburden; rock-and-overburden volume uses total drilled depth.
Drill Log JSON backups preserve pattern groups and per-hole PatternID assignments.
All m39.4 PDF navigation, load calculations, selection, transfer, GPS, conditions, Quick Fill, themes, backups, and offline features remain included.
